title: Barehipani Falls
tagline: Barehipani Falls — heritage city of Odisha

overview.short: Barehipani Falls is a two-tiered waterfall located in Simlipal National Park in Mayurbhanj district in the Indian state of Odisha.
overview.description: Barehipani Falls is a two-tiered waterfall located in Simlipal National Park in Mayurbhanj district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is the second highest waterfalls in India.

topPlaces.name: Joranda Falls
topPlaces.description: The Joranda Falls (Odia: ଯୋରନ୍ଦା ପ୍ରପାତ) is a waterfall located in the core area of Simlipal National Park in Mayurbhanj district in the Indian state of Odisha. The Barehipani Falls (India's second highest waterfall) is located close to the Joranda Falls.

items.note: The Joranda Falls (Odia: ଯୋରନ୍ଦା ପ୍ରପାତ) is a waterfall located in the core area of Simlipal National Park in Mayurbhanj district in the Indian state of Odisha. The Barehipani Falls (India's second highest waterfall) is located close to the Joranda Falls.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Barehipani Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Barehipani Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Barehipani Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (188 km) and the nearest railway station is Jamshedpur (Tatanagar) (97 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Barehipani Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Barehipani Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Barehipani Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Barehipani Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Barehipani Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Joranda Falls.
